'''Maslak plants''' was a type of an [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Plant/Legends|plants]] that grew on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Somov Rit]]. They had a thick green stalk growing out of a lily, ending in a bulbous pod that contained winged seeds. The seeds would be released when the pod burst.

{{Flora-stub}}

*[[Jedi vs. Sith 1|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 1]]
